long_description:
[COM]-device-agent pod is not ready [SAO] is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_insufficient_running_pods_for_deployment.html
TIP Situation: Observed Pod Not Ready issue in Genctl-Pod-Not-Ready
TIP Short Description: A pod is not ready for the past 10 minutes

TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone2t7:node:sao1-qz1-sr2-rk154-s02
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Metric:

Segment:

Time:             12/02/2025 10:45 PM UTC
